title: Quran, Sura 91: Ash-Shams
description: Sura 91 (Ash-Shams: The Sun) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 91 (Ash-Shams: The Sun) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the sun and its brightness, and the moon when it follows it, and the day when it displays it, and the night when it covers it.
